locations.title: Locations
locations.description: Cities, regions, or countries to search. Include the country name when a place could be ambiguous.

venueTypes.title: Venue types
venueTypes.description: Venue taxonomy IDs to search. Output types are classified separately from venue and website evidence and may differ from the search types.

maxPlacesPerLocation.title: Maximum places per location
maxPlacesPerLocation.description: Hard cap for discovery results per location.

includeWebsiteEnrichment.title: Enrich official websites
includeWebsiteEnrichment.description: Crawl selected pages on identified official websites. Keep the individual extraction options enabled to populate their corresponding output fields.

includeReviews.title: Analyze public reviews
includeReviews.description: Analyze public reviews when a review source is configured. Live Google Maps review collection is not available in this MVP.

maxReviewsPerPlace.title: Maximum reviews per place
maxReviewsPerPlace.description: Hard cap for public reviews analyzed per venue.

maxWebsitePagesPerPlace.title: Maximum official website pages
maxWebsitePagesPerPlace.description: Hard cap for official website pages crawled per venue.

extractPricing.title: Extract pricing
extractPricing.description: Extract visible crawlable prices only when nearby text identifies child, adult, toddler, or family pricing.

extractAgeSuitability.title: Extract age suitability
extractAgeSuitability.description: Extract explicitly stated venue-wide age suitability and toddler areas; ambiguous ticket-category ranges remain null.

sourceLanguages.title: Source languages
sourceLanguages.description: Expected source languages; auto detects when possible.

preserveOriginalText.title: Preserve original text
preserveOriginalText.description: Keep selected source-language evidence fields such as original names, age text, prices, and booking cues.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional Apify Proxy configuration for browser requests.
